labels.1579: The feature fires on Chinese characters describing geographic locations or spatial relationships within descriptive property/place passages.
labels.1969: Geographic descriptors of locations in Chinese text, particularly phrases describing proximity to landmarks or natural features.
labels.2175: The feature fires on phrases describing geographic locations or spatial relationships of places in Chinese text.
labels.3142: Phrases describing geographic locations or spatial relationships in Chinese (坐落、鄰近、有).
labels.3148: Descriptive phrases about geographical locations, particularly nouns and noun phrases describing natural features or place names in Chinese text.
labels.3281: Phrases describing the location or geographical position of a place, often introducing details about where something is situated.
labels.3715: Geographical location descriptions in Chinese text, specifically phrases describing spatial positions or landscape features of places.
labels.4792: Chinese text describing geographical locations and physical features of places (villages, cities, forests, orchards).
labels.5298: Geographic descriptors of location features, particularly adjacent natural or architectural elements.
labels.6370: The feature activates on Chinese text describing locations or places within descriptive passages about houses and geographic areas.
labels.6471: Location descriptions with geographic or directional details about specific areas.
labels.6783: Phrases describing geographical or architectural locations and their distinctive features or surroundings.
labels.7287: Geographic descriptors of locations within or near villages, particularly describing natural features or landmarks in different regions.
labels.9722: The feature activates on phrases describing geographical locations or compositional descriptions of places in Chinese text.
labels.10180: The feature activates on Chinese text describing geographical locations and spatial relationships of buildings or landmarks.
labels.10702: Chinese text describing geographical locations with specific descriptive phrases about adjacent features.
labels.12861: Geographic location descriptors in Chinese text about places, villages, and their spatial characteristics.
labels.13011: Geographic descriptive phrases that follow location names or precede geographical features in Chinese text.
labels.13375: Phrases describing geographic locations or spatial relationships of places in Chinese text.
labels.14892: Phrases describing geographical locations or spatial relationships between places and landmarks in Chinese text.
labels.15186: Descriptive phrases about geographical locations or natural features in Chinese text.
labels.16462: Geographic descriptions of locations in Chinese, particularly phrases describing spatial relationships and nearby landmarks.
labels.16843: Geographic location descriptions in Chinese text about neighborhoods, districts, and their distinctive features.
labels.17179: Geographic location descriptions in Chinese text, specifically phrases describing where buildings or places are situated.
labels.17416: The feature detects descriptive phrases introducing geographical locations or spatial relationships in Chinese text.
